tier_b_normalization.notes: Tier B only. No punctuation stripping, no stemming, no qualifier removal.

skip_exact: Contains 2% or less of the following

Less than 2% of:.note: Drop header; extract forms[] as children when present.

_comment: Store strings exactly as observed in DSLD. Skip check must run before any preprocessing/mapping/unmapped tracking. Tier B is limited to NFC+trim+collapse whitespace; Tier C optionally applies case-insensitive matching. Nutrition facts should NOT be in skip_exact if they are needed for UX; route them via nutritionFacts instead.
